items.title: EC archives of the week (07-13/06): World Food Safety Day (07/06) First European elections (07-10/06/1979, 47 years ago) World Ocean Day (08/06) Portugal National Day (10/06) Visit of Nelson Mandela, President of the African National Congress (ANC), to the CEC (10/06/1991, 35 years ago) Signature of an EU/Slovenia Association Agreement (10/06/1996, 30 years ago) Spain and Portugal join the EU (12/06/1985, 41 years ago) Signature of the Stabilisation and Association Agreement between the EU and Albania (12/06/2006, 20 years ago) Cast-off of the "Treaty of Rome" yacht (13/06/1981, 45 years ago)
